titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 203: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 203. (A.R. No. 621 of 1920.) UḌAIYĀRKUḌI, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a detached stone in the maṇḍapa behind the Navagraha images, Anantēśvara temple.

Built in at the end of every line, hence several details are lost. This inscription refers to the purchase from three sabhās of adjoining villages, three plots of land in the name of the god, Paramasvāmi by two merchant-brothers, Tiruvaraggadēvaṉ and Ayyaṇadēvaṉ and donation of the same for feeding 100 people in the śāla established in the temple śrīmat Dvārāpati ParamaśvāmiIt is not ascertainable how an inscription pertains to feeding in a sāla in the Vaishṇava temple of śrImat Dvārāpati-paramasvāmi is found incised on the walls of Anatēśvara temple, a Śiva temple.in śrI Vīranārāyaṇa-chchaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēyam in the vaḍakarai (northern bank of the river KAvēri) by the donors for the merit of their deceased uncle, Daśanāgan. The details of the plots endowed are furnished below.

The first piece of land (the details lost in the built in portion) was purchased from the sabhaiyār of Ilattūr a brahmadēyam of Veṇṇaiyūr-nāḍu in the name of the god. The land was also freed from taxes. The second plot, 5(1/2) vēli and mā was purchased from the sabhā of Seṉṉinallūr, another brahmadēya of the above nāḍu which was also freed from taxes. Thus, these two plots, totaling 20 and odd vēli of land was formed into a unit called Nindādityanallūr evidently named after their deceased uncle, to provide 80 kalam of food daily at Śrīmatdvārāpati-paramasvāmi temple in Vīranārāyaṇa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam.

The sabhā of Vīranārāyaṇa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam sold 3 vēli of land, freed it from taxes, in the name of the god for feeding twenty brāhmaṇas. As a capital of 300 kaḻañju was required to reclaim this waste land and convert into garden land (kollai) the same was borrowed perhaps from the temple treasury and the yield of this land was to be utilized for providing 20 kalam. Thus the total extent of land endowed for the above said purpose amounted to 23(1/2) vēli and one mā.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 400.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecarivarmmaṟku yāṇṭu 10 6Āvatu vaṭakarai brahmadeyam śrīviranārāyaṇaścaturvvetimaṅkalattu śrīmatdvārāpati paramasvāmi Uṭaiya koyililey ca
�kka vāṇiyaṉ daśanākaṉ nindaṉukkāka Ivaṉ tamaiyaṉmār makkaḷ tiruvaraṅkatevaṉum Aiyyaṇattēvaṉum Ivviruvarum Ipparamasvāmi tirunāmattāl koṇṭu tanta nilamāvaṉa veṇṇaiyūr nāṭṭu brahmadeyam melilattūr sabhaiyār pakkal Ivvūr mel kaḻani candrādityavat Iṟai Ili
rkkellai koṇṭalvāykku meṟkun teṉpārkkellai Iṉṉāṭṭu brahmadeyam meṟceṉṉinallūr Ellaikku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai Immeṟ ceṉṉinallūr Ellaikkey kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai tu vāykkālukku teṟkum Ivvicainta perunāṉkellaiyilu makappaṭṭa nilaṉmi
ramasvāmi tirunāmattāley Ivarkaḷey koṇṭu tanta nilaṉ Iṉṉāṭṭu brahmadeyam meṟceṉṉinallūr sabhaiyār pakkal Ivvūrkkiḻ kaḻaṉi candrādityavat Iṟaiili vilaikkuk koṇṭa nilam 5 10(1/2) Iṉṉilam Añcaraiyey Oru māvukku kiḻpārkkellai koṇṭal vāykku meṟkum teṉ
rkkellai centaṉvāy ceṉṟu parivattaṉai vākkālukkey pāynta ne kku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkkellai Ipparamasvāmi nilattukku teṟkum Ivvicaitta perunāṉkellaiyilu makappaṭṭa nilamikutikkuṟaiyum Uḷḷaṭaṅka nilaṉ 5(1/2)� Iṉṉilam Añcaraiye Oru māvum Āka nilam 2 10 5
ritu nindādityanallūrāvatākavum Iṉnindādityanallūr koṇṭu candrādityavat nicatamum Ūṭṭakkaṭava kalam 8 10 Eṇpatum Ūṭṭak kaṭavomākavum Iyāṇṭu śrīviranārāyaṇaccaturvvedimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyār Ipparamasvāmi tirunāmattāl viṟṟuttanta nilam putuppaṭi muveli Immuveli nilattukkum
tāḷkuṭi Ellaikku kiḻakku kuṇṭaiyūrkkup poṉa peruvaḻikku teṟkum maṇṭakappuṟamāṉa nilattukku meṟkumāka Iṉṉaṭuviṭṭa nilaṉ mikutikkuṟaimai Uḷḷaṭaṅka nilaṉ 3li Immuveliyum Itu kollaiyāka Āḻvārbhaṇṭārattu Itiṉukku tiruttuvicam Illāmaiyil daśanākaṉ ṉindan brāhmaṇabhojaṉattu
l tiruttu vicamākak koṇṭa poṉ 3 100ø Ippoṉ muṉṉūṟṟuk kaḻañcun tiruttuvicamākak koṇṭu Iṉṉilattil bhogattile Irupatu kalamum candrādityavat Ūṭṭakkaṭavomākavum Iṉṉilattukku Ūnā tiruttamvarilum Itin bhogam potilum potāviṭilum Ipparamasvāmikku śrī kāryyañ ceykiṉṟāre Irupatu kalamum candrāditya
ṉṉūṟum Iṉ nnindādityanallūr nilam Irupataraiyey Oru māvum koṇṭu Emperumāṉ koyilil Ivarkaḷ Eṭuppitta cālaiyile nicatam Oru nāḻi neyyuṉ ṉālu kaṟiyum veṟṟilai Añcum pākkiraṇṭum Oru kalam nāḻi morumāka nicatamin nūṟu kalamum daśanākaṉ nindaṉukkāka candrādityavat Ūṭṭakkaṭavomāka Icaintu Ipparicu kallil �
gāvindaṉeṉ Iddharmma mmahāsabhaiyār rakṣai Iddharmmam rakṣippār śrīpādadhuḷi Aṭiyom talaimeliṉa .§
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 203 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
